actions.value:
Hi, you have reached the Edge wallet support team. Within EmberFund, the self-custodial wallet portion of the app uses the same account system of Edge, so you can technically login to Edge with the same wallet username & password that you used when setting up your Ember app.

 

Please send a quick email to help@emberfund.io for any EmberFund support requests pertaining to earning, payouts, and any inquires not related to your Edge account management.
